input.command:
cat >> memory/findings.md << 'EOF'

## DAY 2026-03-14 (TW=1345.79, ~flat)
RESULTS: 833672 Germany (had 0.15#2 held many days, +30.46 WIN - balanced spread w/ right answer EARLY beats late over-concentration on Spain cross-ref); 196640=Al Jazeera (resolution-source! not listed -13.48); 369030 F1 both DNS=McLaren (top team! engine issues seen but not connected, -6.33); 581686 NGO=Emergency (Italian NGO not listed -14.58).
LESSON: having right answer in spread at reasonable weight EARLY > late re-weighting. Consider RESOLUTION SOURCE as candidate (Al Jazeera Qs -> Al Jazeera itself). 
EOF
python3 -c "
import csv
csv.field_size_limit(10**7)
ids={'506444','529060'}
with open('market.csv') as f:
    r=csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in r:
        if row['qid'] in ids:
            print('==',row['qid'],'|',row['title'])
            print('  BG:', row['background'][:240])
            print('  MY:', row['my_prediction'])
"
